testcase.name: 3160-concept-relationship-node-formula-axis-testcase
Concept Relationship Node Formula Axis Testcase
testcase.description: Table linkbase test case using a concept relationship node with different formula axes

variation.name: Concept relationship node with formulaAxis omitted
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. No formula axis is specified, so the tree walk defaults to 'descendant-or-self'. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with formulaAxis omitted
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. No formula axis is specified, so the tree walk defaults to 'descendant-or-self'.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with formulaAxis = descendant-or-self
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. A formula axis of 'descendant-or-self' is specified, so the relationship source and all its descendants are is included. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with formulaAxis = descendant-or-self (with instance)
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. A formula axis of 'descendant-or-self' is specified, so the relationship source and all its descendants are is included.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with formulaAxis = descendant
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. A formula axis of 'descendant' is specified, so the relationship source itself is not included but its descendants are. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with formulaAxis = descendant (with instance)
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. A formula axis of 'descendant' is specified, so the relationship source itself is not included but its descendants are.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with formulaAxis = child-or-self
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. A formula axis of 'child-or-self' is specified, so only the relationship source and its immediate children are included. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with formulaAxis = child-or-self (with instance)
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. A formula axis of 'child-or-self' is specified, so only the relationship source and its immediate children are included.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with formulaAxis = child
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. A formula axis of 'child' is specified, so only the immediate children of the relationship source are included. The relationship source itself is not included. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with formulaAxis = child (with instance)
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. A formula axis of 'child' is specified, so only the immediate children of the relationship source are included. The relationship source itself is not included.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with formulaAxis = sibling
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. A formula axis of 'sibling' is specified, so only the siblings of the relationship source are included. The relationship source itself is not included. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with formulaAxis = sibling (with instance)
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. A formula axis of 'sibling' is specified, so only the siblings of the relationship source are included. The relationship source itself is not included.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with formulaAxis = sibling-or-self
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. A formula axis of 'sibling-or-self' is specified, so the relationship source and all its siblings are included. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with formulaAxis = sibling-or-self (with instance)
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. A formula axis of 'sibling-or-self' is specified, so the relationship source and all its siblings are included.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with formulaAxis = sibling-or-descendant
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. A formula axis of 'sibling-or-descendant' is specified, so the siblings and descendants of the source are included (but not the siblings' descendants, nor the source itself). The descendants of the source are inserted into the resulting tree at the same level and position as the source would have been if it were included.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with formulaAxis = sibling-or-descendant (with instance)
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. A formula axis of 'sibling-or-descendant' is specified, so the siblings and descendants of the source are included (but not the siblings' descendants, nor the source itself). The descendants of the source are inserted into the resulting tree at the same level and position as the source would have been if it were included.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with formulaAxis = sibling-or-descendant and self having a non-trivial tree of descendants
variation.description: Similar to above, but demonstrates that the tree structure below self is preserved and not flattened away.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with formulaAxis = sibling-or-descendant and self having a non-trivial tree of descendants, with instance
variation.description: Similar to above, but demonstrates that the tree structure below self is preserved and not flattened away.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with formulaAxis = sibling-or-descendant-or-self
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. A formula axis of 'sibling-or-descendant-or-self' is specified, so the siblings and descendants of the source are included, along with the source itself (but not the siblings' descendants).

variation.name: Concept relationship node with formulaAxis = sibling-or-descendant-or-self (with instance)
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. A formula axis of 'sibling-or-descendant-or-self' is specified, so the siblings and descendants of the source are included, along with the source itself (but not the siblings' descendants).

variation.name: Concept relationship node with formulaAxis = sibling-or-self starting from network root
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. A formula axis of 'sibling-or-self' is specified, so the relationship source and all its siblings are included. In this variation, the relationship source is at the root of the network, so its siblings are the other network roots. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with formulaAxis = sibling-or-self starting from network root (with instance)
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. A formula axis of 'sibling-or-self' is specified, so the relationship source and all its siblings are included. In this variation, the relationship source is at the root of the network, so its siblings are the other network roots.

variation.name: Concept relationship node for siblings with formulaAxis = sibling
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. Even though the formula axis is 'sibling', both relationship sources are included because they are siblings of each other. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node for siblings with formulaAxis = sibling (with instance)
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. Even though the formula axis is 'sibling', both relationship sources are included because they are siblings of each other.

variation.name: Concept relationship node for siblings with formulaAxis = sibling-or-self
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. A formula axis of 'sibling-or-self' is specified, so the relationship sources and their siblings are included. In this variation, the two relationship source are each others' sibling, so each is included twice. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node for siblings with formulaAxis = sibling-or-self (with instance)
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. A formula axis of 'sibling-or-self' is specified, so the relationship sources and their siblings are included. In this variation, the two relationship source are each others' sibling, so each is included twice.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with formulaAxis = sibling-or-self but no relationship source
variation.description: Invalid table with a concept-relationship node that specifies a formula axis of 'sibling-or-self', but no relationship source. The relationship source is assumed to be xfi:root, but this has no siblings, so the resulting tree contains no concepts.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with formulaAxis = sibling-or-self and a relationship source of xfi:root
variation.description: Invalid table with a concept-relationship node that specifies a formula axis of 'sibling-or-self', but no relationship source. The relationship source is assumed to be xfi:root, but this has no siblings, so the resulting tree contains no concepts.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with a formula axis expression
variation.description: Invalid table with a concept relationship node that specifies the formula axis using an XPath expression. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with a formula axis expression, with instance
variation.description: Invalid table with a concept relationship node that specifies the formula axis using an XPath expression.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with an invalid formula axis expression
variation.description: Invalid table with a concept relationship node that specifies the formula axis using an XPath expression that does not evaluate to a valid value from the enumeration.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with a formula axis expression that evaluates to a sequence
variation.description: Invalid table with a concept relationship node that specifies the formula axis using an XPath expression that evaluates to a sequence of values.
